name: Vidalia Onion Baked
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully peel the onions and cut the root end so the onion will sit upright.
2. Cut the stem end flat and core out the center of the onion with a melon baller or small spoon.
3. Place the onion in a close-fitting heatproof bowl.
4. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of sugar into the center, then cover the sugar with a drizzle of butter (or margarine), and season with salt and pepper.
5. Bake in a toaster oven until soft and creamy, about 45 minutes.
Options:
- Reduce or increase the amount of sugar used.
- Add chili powder, ancho peppers, or jalapeños for extra flavor.
- Cook the onions on the grill by covering them with foil first.
- Freeze individual portions in a plastic bag. When needed, grab a handful for your recipe.
